page_title: How to Build Battle Teams | Pokemon Champions｜Game8

content.title: Put Together a Well-Rounded Team
content.body: Choose Your Core Pokemon Know Your Win Condition Choose Your Main Three Choose Your Backups

content.title: Know the Difference Between Single and Double Battle
content.body: Figuring out the build for a team also depends on what kind of matches players are going to get into. Single Battle is the more classic type of battle that have Pokemon going up against each other one-on-one, but Double Battle will have 2 Pokemon fighting alongside each other against another team of 2.

content.title: Understand Pokemon Roles
content.body: When it comes to building your teams, it helps to know what role each Pokemon is going to play. Some Pokemon may not be great in attacking, but they make up for it by being able to take a lot of damage, or being able to boost the stats of other Pokemon in their team. There are specific roles for each Pokemon, and defined in the game.

content.title: Learning Strengths and Weaknesses
content.body: Pokemon Type Matchup Chart View Full Image

content.title: Keep a Close Eye on Stats
content.body: While it's easy enough to jump into Pokemon Champions, really effective players always keep a close eye on statistics . They keep track on their team's speed stats to figure out who gets to move first; and they also know which moves can affect stats as well.
